description.s: Mobile-specific views and navigation rather than responsive desktop UI.
Don't make the desktop UI responsive. Instead, create mobile-specific containers and views:
Different layout views (linear scroll vs spatial canvas)
: Hierarchical drill-down instead of tree view
Separate entry point or same URL with platform detection?
What subset of features makes sense on mobile?
Is editing on mobile important, or primarily consumption?
What's the offline storage limit on mobile browsers?

The item system supports this naturally — views are items, and different views can render the same data differently. A mobile viewport view could be a separate view item that presents a touch-optimized interface.
is implemented first (mobile without sync is limited to single-device use).
